title: A portable system and device for multi-tasking and method thereof
abstract: The present invention provides a device and method for recording notes based on plurality of inputs including but not limited to voice, text, image, video and capturing meeting conversations, preparing minutes of meetings, organizing data, files etc. The portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) for receiving, capturing and integrating information from multiple input sources, multiple situations and to do multitasking, wherein series of buttons are categorically classified based on their plurality of functionality. The series of buttons comprises: create key which works in conjunction with text, voice, video keys to create text, voice & video files; select keys to select single or multiple files and a set of lock keys to lock single or multiple selected files; a set of move keys to move selected files and a set of release keys to release moved or locked files or an auto-Move Key to automatically move files to a next calendar date; a name key working in conjunction with other keys to name photos, voice files, video, brain files and folders and an existing files, wherein the name key initiates a naming pop-up display to instantaneously name photo, voice, video, Brain files and folders by input naming text in the naming pop-up display, and wherein name key in conjunction with create key, GPS key tags created photos with GPS data, and wherein the name key helps in naming existing files by working along with the select keys; view activation key configured to display previously run files and the next files to be run; and home key configured to bring the MTDS in default setting.
claims:
Claims I Claim: 1. A portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) for receiving, capturing and integrating information from multiple input sources, multiple situations and to do multitasking, the MTDS comprising: a memory configured to store a set of predefined instructions; a processor operably coupled to the memory and configured to perform the set of predefined instructions stored in the memory; a mirror memory to store duplicate data information; at least two display screen; a camera operably coupled to the processor and inbuilt with the MTDS to capture image of paper notes or hand written notes or black board notes or any object or to capture video notes, wherein the processor convert the captured image into text format; a scanner operably coupled to the processor and inbuilt with the MTDS to scan paper notes or hand written notes, wherein the processor convert the scanned notes into text format; a pluggable waterproof microphone based voice recorder operably coupled to the processor and inbuilt with the MTDS to record voice notes, wherein the processor convert the voice notes into text format; a brain computer interface operably coupled to the processor and inbuilt or interfaced with the MTDS to record brain notes, wherein the processor convert the brain notes into text format; a printer operably coupled to the processor and inbuilt with the MTDS to print processed information on a paper; a paper tray to store pre-sized, pre-formatted slot printed paper of a particular size which is inbuilt with the MTDS and configured with the scanner to scan the handwritten slot printed paper; a plurality of remote input devices which includes voice memo recorder, video memo recorder, brain memo recorder and are in wired or wireless communication with the processor of the MTDS; a clock to provide timestamp information to the received information; and a series of hardware buttons led Computer function command execution in configuration with the processor, the memory and the display to perform routine management tasks in faster manner, wherein the series of buttons are categorically classified based on their plurality of functionality, the series of buttons comprises: 

 create key which works in conjunction with text, voice, video keys to create text, voice & video files; select keys to select single or multiple files and a set of lock keys to lock single or multiple selected files; a set of move keys to move selected files and a set of release keys to release moved or locked files or an auto-Move Key to automatically move files to a next calendar date; a name key working in conjunction with other keys to name photos, voice files, video, brain files and folders and an existing files, wherein the name key initiates a naming pop-up display to instantaneously name photo, voice, video, Brain files and folders by input naming text in the naming pop-up display, and wherein name key in conjunction with create key, GPS key tags created photos with GPS data, and wherein the name key helps in naming existing files by working along with the select keys; view activation key configured to display previously run files and the next files to be run; and home key configured to bring the MTDS in default setting. 2. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises a set of functional keys which includes photo key, voice key, music key, video key, and brain key, wherein each of the functional keys are configured to store information with the help of the keys such as photo notes, business cards, warranty under photo keys and individual voice notes key, phone voice notes, 3rd person voice notes, under voice key; video notes under video key and brain notes under brain key. 3. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 2, wherein the voice notes key in conjunction with day alarm keys, naming keys and other keys perform voice sorting. 4. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 2, wherein the photo notes include information obtained and stored in segregated folders from keys such as restaurant key, news articles key, bills key, brochure key, diary and additional custom photo notes sub-sub category keys. 5. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises a set of task keys which includes office key, work key, project keys, meetings key, personal key and 

 additional custom task key, wherein the set of task keys are configured to store information in segregated folders. 6. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 5, wherein the personal key is configured to create a personal folder within a task folder and is configured to store personal information in the personal folder. 7. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 5, wherein the personal folder may include an event folder, wherein the event folder stores information related to a particular event. 8. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 7, wherein the event folder stores further information of sub event categories includes information obtained from keys such as holiday key, weekend key, sports key, exhibition key, and additional custom event sub category keys. 9. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises a set of calendar keys which includes date, month, year and navigation keys configured to build a calendar date. 10. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 9, wherein the series of buttons further comprises an alarm keys which includes months, hours and minutes keys and configured to set alarm with help of the date key, the month key and the navigation key. 11. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises a set of quick notes keys which are configured to make quick notes and store the notes made in a specified folder. 12. The portable MTDS as claimed in claim 9, wherein the series of buttons further comprises of quick text keys, quick phone number keys, quick email key, quick URL key, quick phone voice notes key and quick 3rd person voice notes key. 13. A method performed in portable Multi Task Device System (MTDS) for creating a file or folder, naming the file or the folder, storing information in the created file or the folder, the method comprises: creating a file or folder, when a create key is pressed by a user simultaneously or in succession with text key and name key or folder key and name key respectively; poping a box on at least one of the display of the MTDS for naming the created file or folder to receive text input from the user to name the file or the folder; and storing data, and information in the named file or folder based on input from the user, wherein all the data and information is named with the name of the folder with increasing integer in order of their storage. 14. The method as claimed in claim 13, further comprising creating a photo file, naming the photo file and storing the photo file when the photo key is pressed simultaneously or in succession with the create key and name key or its combination thereof , wherein the created photos are stored at default location with the entered name ; and when pressed additionally with the folder key the created photo file is created with a default name within the named created folder. 15. The method as claimed in claim 14, wherein storing the created photos in the created folder comprises storing the created photos with the same name as that of the folder if photo plus key is pressed simultaneously or in succession with the create key, name key, photo key, and folder key or its combination thereof. 16. The method as claimed in claim 13 further comprises selecting a single or multiple file from said stored data, when select key is pressed by the user in conjunction with a lock keys which lock single or multiple selected files. 17. The method as claimed in claim 13 further comprises moving selected files from one folder or location to another folder or location when a move key is pressed in conjunction with a release key which is used to release the moved or locked files to the another folder or location 18. The method as claimed in claiml 3, wherein the data includes captured photographs, picture notes, voice notes, video notes, brain notes, scanned notes, or the like. 19. The method as claimed in claim 13, wherein the dimension of the box includes at least 8 mm in height and 100 mm in length. 20. The method as claimed in claim 13, wherein the box is poped- up for maximum of 60 seconds. 21. The portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) as claimed in claim 1 is a To Do Utility System (TUDS) for quickly making To Do notes, wherein the series of buttons further comprises a visual space key which is configured to create a visual space, wherein text data is entered and displayed, and wherein the visual space has at least 15 slot and each slot accommodate one line and at least 60 characters. 22. The TUDS as claimed in claim 21 , wherein a hand-written note on a To Do paper page is inserted into the To-Do visual space along with 1 :1 mapping of paper slot to the To-Do visual space slot, by first scanning the To-Do paper page, wherein a single To Do paper contains at least 10 slots and the paper slot contents are mapped to the numerically corresponding slots of the visual space for a single calendar date or single named project. 23. The TUDS as claimed in claim 21 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises keys such as name key, select key, delete key, move key, auto move key, to name, move and delete To-Do visual space Slots. 24. The TUDS as claimed in claim 21 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises of a procrastination key which works in conjunction with the alarm key and a select To-Do slot, once activated it shall flash procrastination reminder icon on the screen along with a beep. The procrastination key used to track tough To-Do tasks. 25. The TUDS as claimed in claim 21 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises date utility switches that includes key like today, yesterday , tomorrow, day after tomorrow weekend, next week. 26. The TUDS as claimed in claim 22, wherein the series of buttons further comprises a To-Do Automate key which is used to convert the paper slot handwritten or typed lines to text in the desired To-do Slots of "To-Do Visual Spaceâby image processing or artificial intelligence, in situations where there has been no automatic conversion of image into text. 27. The portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) as claimed in claim 1 is a Meetings Sorter System (MSS), wherein a series of buttons further comprises of text, picture, handwritten Picture Notes, electronic pen, light-based input, brain inputs, voice, video, electronic and paper business card input keys to record meeting inputs. 28. The Meetings Sorter System (MSS) as claimed in 27, wherein the series of buttons further comprises create key, name key, photo key, photo plus key and folder key to create meeting folder and meeting files with automatic naming of input files within the meetings folders. 29. The Meetings Sorter System (MSS) as claimed in 27, wherein the series of buttons further comprises an Add-On key for creation of Add-On meeting folders to capture inputs from follow-up meetings. 30. The portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) as claimed in claim 1 is a Product Warranty system (PWS), wherein the PWS comprises a series of alarm buttons and series of input sources, wherein the series of alarm buttons are configured to set the alarm by a series of month keys or year based on the series of the input sources, and wherein the series of input sources includes text input, voice input, paper business card input, barcode input, phone number input, URL input, product picture/video input, scanned paper notes input, serial number input. 31. The portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) as claimed in claim 1 is a Voice sorter system (VSS), wherein the VSS takes in sound input which includes human voice, machine sound input, and wherein a voice file is created based on the voice input , with the voice file tagged with an extended text display from voice to text conversion by making use of voice to text processing and Al. 32. The Voice sorter system (VSS) as claimed in claim 31 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises yesterday key, today key, tomorrow key, day after tomorrow key, weekend key, next week key and the like. 33. The Voice sorter system (VSS) as claimed in claim 31 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises of task buttons like office key, personal key and custom task categories. 34. The Voice sorter system (VSS) as claimed in claim 31 , wherein the series of buttons further comprises of phone voice notes key to record phone input which operate in conjunction with a connected external source. 35. The Voice sorter system (VSS) as claimed in claim 34, wherein the series of buttons further comprises of 3rd person voice notes key which operate in conjunction with a microphone and a custom key. 36. The portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) as claimed in claim 1 is an Electronic Sorting Utility Device System (ESUDS) for manipulating of data stored in the memory, wherein the ESUDS manipulates data stored in the mirror memory and uses at least two displays to enable sorting of data. 37. The Electronic Sorting Utility Device System (ESUDS) as claimed in claim 36, wherein the series of buttons further comprises of create and naming keys to help rapidly create and rename files and folders. 38. The Electronic Sorting Utility Device System (ESUDS) as claimed in claim 36, wherein the series of buttons further comprises multiple select key, move key, lock key and release keys that help simultaneously operate on the at least two displays. 39. The Electronic Sorting Utility Device System (ESUDS) as claimed in claim 36, wherein the series of buttons further comprises a display activation key, that displays previously run files along with the next to run files. 40. A portable Multi Tasker Device System (MTDS) for receiving, capturing and integrating information from multiple input sources, multiple situations and to do multitasking, the MTDS comprising: a memory configured to store a set of predefined instructions; a processor operably coupled to the memory and configured to perform the set of predefined instructions stored in the memory; a mirror memory to store duplicate data information; at least two display screen; a camera operably coupled to the processor and inbuilt with the MTDS to capture image of paper notes or hand written notes or black board notes or any object or to capture video notes, wherein the processor convert the captured image into text format; a clock to provide timestamp information to the received information; and a series of software buttons led Computer function command execution in configuration with the processor, the memory and the display to perform routine management tasks in faster manner, wherein the series of buttons are categorically classified based on their plurality of functionality, the series of buttons comprises: create key which works in conjunction with text, voice, video keys to create text, voice & video files; 

 select keys to select single or multiple files and a set of lock keys to lock single or multiple selected files; a set of move keys to move selected files and a set of release keys to release moved or locked files or an auto-Move Key to automatically move files to a next calendar date; a name key working in conjunction with other keys to name photos, voice files, video, brain files and folders and an existing files, wherein the name key initiates a naming pop-up display to instantaneously name photo, voice, video, Brain files and folders by input naming text in the naming pop-up display, and wherein name key in conjunction with create key, GPS key tags created photos with GPS data, and wherein the name key helps in naming existing files by working along with the select keys; view activation key configured to display previously run files and the next files to be run; and home key configured to bring the MTDS in default setting.
